task_completion.description: Verify that Stellarium is configured for the correct location (Mt. Hood) and date (2024-02-04).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Stellarium bottom status bar or location/date windows. The location should indicate Mt. Hood, Oregon, or coordinates near 45.37° N, 121.69° W, with an elevation of 3429m. The date should be set to 2024-02-04.

task_completion.description: Verify that the atmosphere and landscape are disabled, and the azimuthal grid is enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Stellarium sky should have a completely black background (no blue sky or atmospheric scattering), no ground or landscape textures visible, and the azimuthal grid (circular and radial lines) must be visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the first required screenshot showing the Moon below the horizon.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an image viewer or file manager showing a screenshot of the Moon positioned below the 0° altitude line (the horizontal line of the azimuthal grid).

task_completion.description: Verify the second required screenshot showing the exact moment of moonrise.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an image viewer or file manager showing a screenshot where the Moon's geometric center exactly intersects the 0° altitude line on the azimuthal grid.

task_completion.description: Verify that the moonrise time is recorded in the report file in HH:MM format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor or terminal output showing the contents of 'sar_illumination_report.txt' on the Desktop. It must contain the time '11:03' (or '11:04' if rounded).

integrity.description: Verify that the agent actually used the Stellarium graphical interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Stellarium application window, its menus, or its distinct rendering engine should be visible in the screenshots, proving the agent didn't just use a purely text-based astronomical script.

integrity.description: Verify that the screenshots were actually captured and saved to the specified directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of the files existing in '~/Pictures/stellarium/' via a file manager, terminal 'ls' command, or image viewer, rather than just the live Stellarium window.

integrity.description: Verify that the report file was genuinely created on the Desktop.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the file 'sar_illumination_report.txt' on the Desktop or opened in a text editor, ensuring it wasn't just printed to a terminal without saving.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct location is Mt. Hood, Oregon (45.3736 N, 121.6959 W, 3429 m elevation). The correct date is 2024-02-04. The required display settings are: atmosphere OFF, landscape OFF, azimuthal grid ON, cardinal points ON. The exact geometric moonrise (center of the moon crossing 0 degrees altitude) occurs at 11:03:40 UTC. The final report should contain the time '11:03' (or '11:04' if rounded) in HH:MM format.
